message:
fix(codegen): only discard argc/argv when unused

The previous code unconditionally emitted `_ = argc; _ = argv;` which
causes Zig's "pointless discard of function parameter" error when
these parameters are actually used (e.g., by get_arg opcodes).

Now we only emit the discard when uses_args is false, matching the
existing pattern for this_val.

Also removed dead code where both branches of an if/else emitted
identical function signatures.
